response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned full-stack engineer with 15+ years of broad production experience and solid TypeScript fundamentals, but he does not meet the core requirements for this Staff GenAI role. His AI-specific work is confined to a single six-month engagement involving MCP code generators and agentic workflow support, with no demonstrated expertise in RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation, or multi-agent frameworks such as LangGraph or CrewAI. Python—a primary language for AI engineering and listed first among the role's key technologies—is entirely absent from his skill set. The position requires 8+ years of production AI delivery; this candidate's AI exposure is nascent and lacks the enterprise depth and specialization the role demands.
strengths: 15+ years of production engineering across diverse domains with strong TypeScript and Node.js depth
Direct hands-on exposure to Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling and agentic workflow infrastructure at re:cinq
High-throughput data integration experience handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby, demonstrating pipeline and systems scalability skills
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the candidate's listed skills despite being the primary language for AI engineering in this role
AI-specific experience spans only six months and includes no RAG, vector databases, LLM optimization, or multi-agent framework work
Does not satisfy the 8+ years of AI-driven solution development requirement; the overwhelming majority of his career is general software and web engineering
